title: 2046 An Unusual Hand Generator From An Electric Drill
description:
If you want the STL Files and more details on the build for this you can find them here https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6211543
To finish this you will need 3 x thrust bearings 42mm OD, 26mm ID and 11mm thick. 1 x bearing 21mmOD, 15mmID and 4mm thick. some 0.2mm enameled wire. A 2.5kg barbell weight and The motor from an electric drill
